description: Create a content slide on future 6G rollout with a radar-style KPI comparison chart in the left column, a list of 6G use cases in the center-right, and a text callout sidebar on the right.

header.headline: New communications technologies are being developed faster supporting fundamental innovation over the long term – Future 6G rollout a next step
header.sub: 6G commercialization is within reach supporting data-hungry applications

main.title: Timeline of wireless communication networks and their differences across selected KPIs
main.body: Wireless generations from 1G to 6G are compared across KPIs including peak data rate, mobility, latency, devices per km², Mbps per m², spectral efficiency, and network energy efficiency, illustrating 6G as the next major step forward.

right.title: Selected use cases benefitting most from 6G technology

sidebar.body: Callout panel with explanatory narrative about 6G commercialization and implications for future data-hungry applications.
